mnemonics: SHALLOW: Simple Heuristics Allow Learning Without Overwhelming Width
keyPoints: Shallow learning uses models with only one hidden layer or no hidden layers at all
It relies on hand-engineered features rather than learning representations automatically
It forms the foundation for more complex deep learning architectures
commonMistakes: Confusing shallow learning with deep learning (which has multiple hidden layers)
Assuming shallow networks cannot solve complex problems (they can with proper feature engineering)
Overlooking the importance of shallow learning as a stepping stone to understanding deep learning
